name: Format and Import eParcel Zones
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eParcel zones come in a PDF format and can be obtained by the clients eParcel account manager. "tab", "bold": true}, {"text": " to a "}, {"text": "space", "bold": true}, {"text": " for the zone names. If you don't, zone names will jump to the next column."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add 2 more tabs to postcodes to push them into the correct column."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Copy all of the data and paste it into MS Excel"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Format Data in Excel"}], "data-id": "format-data-in-excel"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Format and paste the data under the appropriate column headings."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Column Name"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zone Name"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Name for the zone eg. Sydney Metro, SA Country etc."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zone Code"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Code for the zone eg. Q1, T0, N3 etc."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "From Post Code"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The first post code in the zone (numerically)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To Post Code"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The last post code in the zone (numerically)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Courier"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Name of the courier this information applies to eg. eParcel."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Country"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Code of country the zones apply to eg. AU"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-b75e6ec9"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Paste data under the relevant column headings in the Maropost Commerce zone file."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Fill out Courier and Country fields, making sure the courier name is one that does not yet exist in the Maropost Commerce account"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Drag down "}, {"text": "Zone Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Zone Code", "bold": true}, {"text": " columns so they apply on every row"}]}]}, [{"text": "If the To Post Code is blank, it means the range only covers one post code, so only the From Post Code is specified."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "But for the data to import correctly, it will need the From Post Code in the To Post Code as well."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A quick way to do this is to:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select the column."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Go to "}, {"text": "Edit", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Find", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Go To", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select special."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select Blanks, then click OK."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the first cell write a formula to = the from post code e.g =c3."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Hold down Ctrl and press Enter to apply this to all blank fields."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Copy this column into text editor then back into excel to remove the formula."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Upload Zones into Maropost Commerce"}], "data-id": "upload-zones-into-maropost-commerce"},
